items.title: Jamie Murray, Andy's brother, retires from tennis
items.summary: Jamie Murray, who became the first British doubles player to reach the top of the world rankings, has joined his brother Andy in retirement.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
